name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖Gucci Attache Small Shoulder Bag. The charm of GG Crystal Canvas interprets the 2023 Fall/Winter Men's Accessories collection, with a glossy surface and durable properties injecting contemporary style into the brand's classic design. This small shoulder bag features a recognizable crescent shape, and the G-hook buckle adds design aesthetics. Classic hardware combined with soft materials interprets vintage charm in a beautiful and romantic way. Black GG Crystal Canvas, palladium-tone hardware, red and blue striped webbing, also comes with a leather shoulder strap, detachable webbing shoulder strap (45cm high) G-hook with zipper.

Black GG Crystal Canvas, palladium-tone hardware, red and blue striped webbing, also comes with a leather shoulder strap, detachable webbing shoulder strap (45cm high) G-hook with zipper.
Model: 699409.
Size: 23(W)x 22(H)x 5cm(D)
Color: Black / Crystal PVC.
Made in Italy
